x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: To formalize a relationship where the partner refers potential customers to the bank.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Distribution Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enables the partner to distribute or resell the banks products or services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Co-Branding or Co-Marketing Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Jointly market a product or service under both the bank's and partners brands.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Outsourcing Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Formalizes outsourcing of business or IT functions to a third-party partner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Technology or Service Provider Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Engages a partner to provide a technology platform, software, or operational services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Joint Venture or Strategic Alliance Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Defines a long-term partnership to create and operate a shared business initiative.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Revenue Sharing Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Establishes how revenue generated through the partnership will be split.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Licensing Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Grants the bank rights to use the partners technology, brand, or IP.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Sharing or Data Access Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enables secure and compliant sharing of data between the bank and the partner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Aggregator or Platform Partnership Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Formalizes a relationship with partners that aggregate financial services (e.g., fintech marketplaces or super apps).
